description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Cross-Platform CI that runs on every push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. Use a matrix job that runs on macos-latest, windows-latest, and ubuntu-latest. For each OS, check out the repository, prepare the environment, create a build directory, configure and build with CMake, run tests, and generate badges based on the build status. Finally, publish the badges to a gh-pages branch.
